features: Meet to All Kinds of Blind Angle Cleaning: The brush set has 5 pieces brushes. Five different brushes for different kind and different size of bottles.
Sturdy And Flexible: Flexible neck for easy reach to get a serious clean within bottles bottom. The brushes can be bent freely, you can always find a fit tool when cleaning gaps, dead angle places.
Product Size: The five brushes sre in different sizes: 38*5cm, 33*5cm, 36*1cm, 35*0.8cm, 23*1.6cm. Weight: 116g. Material: Plastic.
Easy to Clean And Storage: You can clean it with dishwasher. And they are easr to dry quickly and easily stored in a kitchen cupboard or hung on a hook.

Good Cleaning Helper: Each one unique size and shape for cleaning hard to reach places such as inside tea kettles,wine decanters, coffee filters, jugs, flasks, cups, tumblers, feeders, flower vases, kettle,straw, teapot and much more.
description: Product Description Qisan Bottle Cleaning Brush Set Bottle cleaning brush set Our bottle cleaning brushes are high-quality bottle brush to clean anything you need at a great value. They will your good cleaning helpers no matter where you may be. Details The brush is made of aoderate hardness bristles and stainless stell. The handle is so durable that you will feel comfortable to hold and use. Work Well for Sinks Draings & Pipes This long handle and bendable wire work great for sink, drains & pipes，keeps your kitchen clean. Great for different kind and different size of bottles 4&5 pieces of bottle cleaning brushes with different sizes to meet different place cleaning needs, such as teapot, kettle,wine decanters, coffee filters, jugs, flasks, cups,straw and so on. Bendable Flexible neck for easy reach to get a serious clean within bottles bottom and any hard-to-reach places.
